chunks.text: Order Sheet IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI Cr. Bail Appln No.1091 of 2025 Date Order with Signature of Judge For hearing of bail application 25.08.2025 None present for the applicants. Mr. Abdul Rauf, Advocate for the complainant a/w the complainant. Mr. Tahir Hussain Mangi, APG Sindh. ------------------------------- No one is present on behalf of the applicants. Same was the position on the last two dates of hearing viz. 03.07.2025 and 18.08.2025. Dismissed for non-prosecution. J U D G E Asif
